'''''Chilastra''''' was a [[MOD-17 container freighter]] converted to transport refugees from [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] while it was under [[Yuuzhan Vong]] occupation.<ref name="HotI" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
*''Chilastra'' was also the name of a server - or "Galaxy" - in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|8|Hive of the Infidel}}
